creator: tembun@bk.ru
text:
I just compiled gource-0.55 with boost 1.87 on 13.4-RELEASE and it works fine, so maybe your issue is indeed local?  Honestly, I do not know an easy way to build boost 1.85, because, as I can see, it does not present in quarterly packages for FreeBSD-13: release_4 has 1.84 and release_5 has a 1.86.  I'm not that experienced, so maybe I'm missing something.

Anyway, if gource-0.55 can be built with boost 1.87 (which is the latest version available in the ports), can we just bump gource version to the 0.55 as well?  Or do we still need a support for boost 1.85?

Artem
